DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jan-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Kevin Mallon, Esq. 861-2265 for pltf & opposing party; Paul B. Schroeder, Esq. 510/769-9900 for deft & moving party Silveira Pontiac-Buick-GMC, Inc.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer to 2nd cause of action sustained with leave to amend to allege duty to disclose independent of Vehicle Leasing Act. Demurrer to 4th cause of action sustained with leave to amend restitutional claim under B&P code as to others inadequately alleged. Motion to strike moot.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Pltf has 20 days to amend; deft has 30 days to respond.

MOTION To Strike 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Kevin Mallon, Esq. 861-2265 for pltf & opposing party; Paul B. Schroeder, Esq. 510/769-9900 for deft & moving party Silveira Pontiac-Buick-GMC, Inc.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer to 2nd cause of action sustained with leave to amend to allege duty to disclose independent of Vehicle Leasing Act. Demurrer to 4th cause of action sustained with leave to amend restitutional claim under B&P code as to others inadequately alleged. Motion to strike moot.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Pltf has 20 days to amend; deft has 30 days to respond.
